stories.title: Messi Named in Argentina's 55-Man Provisional World Cup Squad
stories.desc: Lionel Messi was included in Argentina's preliminary 55-player roster for the 2026 World Cup, setting up a record sixth tournament appearance for the 38-year-old captain as Argentina looks to defend their title.

stories.title: BLACKPINK's Lisa to Headline 2026 World Cup Opening Ceremony
stories.desc: Thai singer Lisa from BLACKPINK will perform at the FIFA World Cup 2026 opening ceremony in Los Angeles on June 12, joining Katy Perry, Future, and others in one of three opening shows across North America.

stories.title: Panini Launches Biggest-Ever World Cup Sticker Album with 980 Stickers
stories.desc: Panini officially launched its 2026 FIFA World Cup sticker album on April 28 at Wembley Stadium, featuring 980 stickers across 112 pages—the largest collection in history covering all 48 teams.

stories.title: 14 Exclusive Panini Stickers Only Available Through Coca-Cola Bottles
stories.desc: The 2026 Panini album includes 14 exclusive stickers unavailable in standard packs, with 12 hidden inside specially marked Coca-Cola bottles featuring stars like Lamine Yamal and Harry Kane.

stories.title: 48-Team World Cup Expands to 104 Matches with New Round of 32
stories.desc: The 2026 World Cup marks the first expansion to 48 teams, with 12 groups of four and a new round of 32 format. The tournament runs June 11-July 19 across 16 cities in USA, Canada, and Mexico.

stories.title: Coca-Cola Partners with Panini for First-Ever North American Sticker Promotion
stories.desc: Coca-Cola is making history with its first partnership with Panini America, placing 12 exclusive FIFA World Cup stickers on specially marked 20-oz bottles available from mid-May across North America.
